'''kangala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:graemite|graemite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:graemite|graemite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kangala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kængælæth|kængælæth]] || [[word:kængælæj|kængælæj]] || [[word:kængælæsh|kængælæsh]] || [[word:kængælæ|kængælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangangalath|kangangalath]] || [[word:kangangalaj|kangangalaj]] || [[word:kangangalash|kangangalash]] || [[word:kangangala|kangangala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangalath|kangalath]] || [[word:kangalaj|kangalaj]] || [[word:kangalash|kangalash]] || [[word:kangala|kangala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangaflath|kangaflath]] || [[word:kangaflaj|kangaflaj]] || [[word:kangaflash|kangaflash]] || [[word:kangaflaf|kangaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kangalatha|kangalatha]] || [[word:kangalaja|kangalaja]] || [[word:kangalasha|kangalasha]] || [[word:kangalaka|kangalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kangalath|kangalath]] || [[word:kangalaj|kangalaj]] || [[word:kangalash|kangalash]] || [[word:kangala|kangala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kangalathal|kangalathal]] || [[word:kangalajal|kangalajal]] || [[word:kangalashal|kangalashal]] || [[word:kangalakal|kangalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kangalathatha|kangalathatha]] || [[word:kangalajaja|kangalajaja]] || [[word:kangalashasha|kangalashasha]] || [[word:kangalaka|kangalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kangalathan|kangalathan]] || [[word:kangalajan|kangalajan]] || [[word:kangalashan|kangalashan]] || [[word:kangalakan|kangalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kangalathaoro|kangalathaoro]] || [[word:kangalajaoro|kangalajaoro]] || [[word:kangalashaoro|kangalashaoro]] || [[word:kangalakaoro|kangalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
